productDisplayName: Puma Women Heroes Graphic Black Tops
description: Composition Black round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, that has softly ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, brand badge stitched on the left sleeve and graphic print on the front with flock detailing Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with like colours in cool water at 30 degrees Do not bleach Do not tumble dry Warm iron Do not dry clean Looking hep comes easy with this black Heroes t-shirt from puma. A smart graphic pattern of fabulous puma shoes on the front makes this T-shirt absolutely irresistible. Team it with jeans or shorts for that perfect look.
